evaluators.name: Family Dinner Friday Restaurant Saved Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user saved at least one qualifying family-friendly restaurant meeting all criteria into a list named 'Family Dinner Friday'.

evaluators.name: Cheapest 24/7 Plumber Emergency Contacts Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user compared at least two qualifying 24/7 plumbers and added the cheapest qualifying one to the 'Emergency Contacts' list.

evaluators.name: Weekend Plan Free Saturday Events Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user saved two different free Saturday afternoon events within 5 miles into the 'Weekend Plan' list.

evaluators.name: Environmental Volunteering Contacted Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user sent at least one organizer message to an environmental volunteering event within the next month, within 15 miles, with at least 10 spots remaining.

evaluators.name: Local Parks Playground and Dog-Friendly Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user bookmarked at least one park with both a playground and dog-friendly area within 3 miles into the 'Local Parks' list.

evaluators.name: Beginner Yoga Group Join and RSVP Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user joined a qualifying beginner-friendly weekday evening yoga group within 10 miles and RSVP'd 'going' to its next upcoming session.

evaluators.name: Childcare Options Shortlist Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user saved at least one qualifying childcare provider meeting all criteria into the 'Childcare Options' list.

evaluators.name: Home Services List Subcategories Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user created or updated a 'Home Services' list containing at least one qualifying electrician, one gardener, and one cleaner, all within 10 miles and rated at least 4.0.
